title: citrus × aurantium subf. medioglobosa
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. medioglobosa, also known as bitter orange, is a subtaxon of the bitter orange plant that is primarily found in the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, due to the presence of limonene and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. medioglobosa include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve circulation, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Citrus × aurantium subf. medioglobosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
